domain: Tongan Taumafa Kava ceremony (Polynesian kava ceremony with strict seniority seating, tier-graded cup distribution, tier-calibrated clap acknowledgement protocol: 1-clap before drinking + 3-clap after as ritual ack)
specific_mechanism: Tier-graded message weighting + tier-graded acknowledgement-count protocol for hierarchical multi-agent LLM systems; messages from tier T weighted by w_T, messages to tier T require T+1 acks from lower tiers.
llm_application: KAVA-CIRCLE-FB: a tier-graded feedback-attenuation protocol for hierarchical multi-agent LLM systems. Agents have tier T ∈ {0..K} assigned at task-startup based on calibrated confidence/role. Messages from tier T are weighted by w_T = exp(-α*T) when updating other agents' beliefs; messages TO tier T require T+1 acknowledgements (clap-count) from strictly lower tiers before being committed. Rotation: orchestrator (T=0) passes msg in fixed clockwise tier order at each cycle. Differs from RECONCILE confidence-weighted voting (no tier-graded ack count), AgentNet decentralized DAG (no rigid tier order), MAGRPO group-relative advantage (uniform), Instruction Hierarchy (tier-graded privilege but no rotation+ack-count) by combining (a) fixed-tier seating, (b) tier-graded ack-count, (c) clockwise rotation pass.
novelty_claim: Multi-Agent Collaboration via Evolving Orchestration + AgentNet + MAGRPO + RECONCILE all exist as multi-agent frameworks. KAVA-CIRCLE-FB recombines tier-graded ack-count + rotation + tier-weighted feedback. Recombination of existing components.
